data.user_prompt: Who offers family therapy and care coordination in Louisville?
data.system_message: Answer as a local-search assistant for a person in Louisville, Kentucky. Prefer current local providers and cite source URLs when available.
data.tag: lmhg llm response claude Who offers family therapy and care coordination in Louisville?

sections.text:
Here's a roundup of local providers in Louisville, KY offering **family therapy** and related **care coordination** services:

---

### 🏡 Family Therapy Providers in Louisville, KY

---

#### 1. [Creative Family Counseling](https://creativefamilycounseling.org/)
📍 8134 New LaGrange Road, Suite 102, Louisville, KY | 📞 (502) 709-0410
Creative Family Counseling offers therapy services to children, teenagers, adults, and families using an integrative and creative approach.

annotations.title: Visit Our Louisville, KY Campus | Creative Family Counseling

sections.text: They are well known for Animal-Assisted Therapy and also offer Emotionally Focused Therapy (EFT), EMDR, Play Therapy, and Art Therapy.

annotations.title: Visit Our Louisville, KY Campus | Creative Family Counseling

sections.text: Their clinicians offer flexible availability for family therapy at both their Prospect Campus and Louisville Campus,

annotations.title: Family Therapy Services | Creative Family Counseling, Louisville, KY

sections.text: and
the Louisville office is open Monday through Saturday from 9:00 a.m. until 7:00 p.m. and is currently accepting new patients, as well as offering online counseling sessions.

annotations.title: Visit Our Louisville, KY Campus | Creative Family Counseling

sections.text:
---

#### 2. [Innovative Family Therapy](https://innovativefamilytherapy.com/)
📍 Louisville, KY
Innovative Family Therapy has multiple therapists licensed in different areas of counseling, so your family can receive help in one building versus traveling to different offices.

annotations.title: Family Therapy & Counseling Sessions Louisville, KY

sections.text: They even allow multiple therapists to work with a single family.

annotations.title: Family Therapy & Counseling Sessions Louisville, KY

sections.text: They offer both in-person and video conference appointments, and have therapists licensed in Kentucky, Indiana, and Tennessee to serve families who live in separate cities.

annotations.title: Family Therapy & Counseling Sessions Louisville, KY

sections.text: They employ enough therapists to make sure clients never get put on a waitlist.

annotations.title: Family Therapy & Counseling Sessions Louisville, KY

sections.text:
---

#### 3. [Brock Family Therapy Center](https://www.brockfamilytherapycenter.com/)
📍 3431 Stony Spring Circle, Louisville, KY 40220

Brock Family Therapy Center is dedicated to client-based services that encourage well-being and the development of strategies for personal growth, with a caring, professional staff committed to providing the best counseling and therapeutic experience possible.

annotations.title: Brock Family Therapy Center | Louisville Family Therapy and Counseling Center

sections.text: Their unique business approach also allows them to train the clinicians of tomorrow while providing quality emotional guidance to those in need.

annotations.title: Brock Family Therapy Center | Louisville Family Therapy and Counseling Center

sections.text:
---

#### 4. [Haven Family Counseling (Boys & Girls Haven)](https://boysandgirlshaven.org/programs/haven-family-counseling/)
📍 2301 Goldsmith Lane, Louisville, KY 40218 | 📞 502-458-1171
Haven Family Counseling is an outpatient program of Boys & Girls Haven, a private nonprofit agency that has served the Kentucky community for over 70 years.

annotations.title: Haven Family Counseling | Boys & Girls Haven

sections.text: They specialize in addressing the behavioral and emotional needs of children, adolescents, adults, and families, and can provide intensive in-home therapy and case management, or less intensive services at their outpatient office in Louisville.

annotations.title: Haven Family Counseling | Boys & Girls Haven

sections.text:
This makes them a strong option for **care coordination**, as they offer case management alongside therapy.

---

#### 5. [Counseling Unconditionally](https://counselingunconditionally.com/family-therapist-louisville-ky/)
📍 Louisville, KY
Their family therapists work with families of all shapes and sizes — parents and children, blended families, multigenerational households, and more.

annotations.title: Family Therapist Louisville, KY - Counseling Unconditionally

sections.text: Louisville family therapists at Counseling Unconditionally use evidence-based approaches including systemic family therapy, emotionally focused therapy, and solution-focused interventions.

annotations.title: Family Therapist Louisville, KY - Counseling Unconditionally

sections.text:
---
